education.degree: Bachelor of Technology – Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: Pursuing BTech in Computer Science with focus on software engineering, algorithms, distributed systems, and full-stack web development. Ranked among top 25 students for academic excellence.
Completed intermediate education with a focus on Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science. Awarded with gold medal for excellence in academics for 7 consecutive years(2014-21).
Completed matriculation with distinction. Ranked in TOP 10 STUDENTS in a batch of 500 students.
